title: senecio aetfatensis
intro: Senecio aetfatensis, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, such as reducing inflammation and acting as a bitter tonic. The health benefits of Groundsel include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, lower cholesterol levels, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Groundsel often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although proper dosing and caution are advised due to the plant's toxicity.
